home.metaDescription: Discover thousands of courses from expert instructors. Learn at your pace with assignments, exams, and certificates on AcademiX.
home.metaTitle: AcademiX — Learn skills that matter | Courses & certificates
home.newsletterSuccessBody: We'll send course recommendations to your inbox.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore by category, level, or instructor. Find the right fit for your goals.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Join with one click. Access lessons, assignments, and track your progress.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete courses and earn certificates to showcase your skills.

audiences.studentsDesc: Browse, enroll, and learn with structured courses and support.
audiences.instructorsDesc: Create and manage courses, engage with learners, and get paid.
audiences.organizationsDesc: Train teams, track progress, and scale learning programs.

testimonials.quote1: AcademiX made it easy to upskill while working full-time. The structure and support are exactly what I needed.
testimonials.quote2: I moved from zero to landing my first dev job in under a year. The courses and community are top-notch.
testimonials.quote3: As an instructor, the tools are intuitive and my students love the experience. Highly recommend.

faq.whatIsA: AcademiX is a learning management system (LMS) where you can discover courses, enroll, watch lessons, complete assignments and exams, and earn certificates. It supports students, instructors, and organizations.
faq.freeA: Yes. Many courses are free. Filter by price on the course catalog to find free options. Paid courses are clearly marked.
faq.certificateA: Completed courses can award certificates you can download or share. Requirements are set by each course instructor.
faq.cancelQ: Can I cancel or get a refund?
faq.cancelA: You can drop a course from your dashboard. Refund policies depend on the course and are shown at enrollment.
faq.supportA: Use the Help or Contact link in the footer, or message your instructor from within a course. For account issues, check our support page.

activity.msg1: Someone just enrolled in Introduction to Python
